installing-pykwiki-on-windows.html.blurb: [TOC] It's easy to use once it's installed; installing can take a little bit of time.  Install Python + download and install [python 2.7.10](https://www.python.org/downloads/) + download ez_setup.py script (by right-clicking and selecting 'save as' [https://bitbucket.org/pypa/setuptools/raw/bootstrap/ez_setup.py](https://bitbucket.org/pypa/setuptools/raw/bootstrap/ez_setup.py) + open the command line prompt, and navigate to where you downloaded (alternatively, use...
